name: @lens/extension
description: Chrome MV3 extension for Lens. Build with `npm run build`, then load-unpacked from dist/.

scripts.build: esbuild content.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/content.js --platform=browser --format=iife --target=chrome120 && esbuild background.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/background.js --platform=browser --format=iife --target=chrome120 && cp manifest.json popup.html popup.js dist/
